message:
fix(tls/tests): suppress unused variable warnings in TLS ALPN test closures

Rename cx -> _cx in 8 TLS test closures (7 in acceptor.rs, 1 in
connector.rs) where the context parameter is not used within the test
body. These tests use run_test_with_cx for the side effect of
establishing a runtime context but don't reference the Cx value
directly. Suppresses clippy::unused_variables warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
